title: Slay the Spire 2 is delayed, but it's twice as big and even more replayable
author: editor@pcgamesn.com
contents:
Slay the Spire 2 has been delayed. That's the bad news out of the way, as the long-awaited deckbuilder sequel slides from its loose 2025 release window into a more specific March 2026. Don't feel too downcast, however; developer Mega Crit actually has some really exciting news for us, with the reveal of new alternate acts that will make the game almost double the size of its predecessor.

Read the rest of the story...
